Golden Ticket Event - Week 1 Starts Now!

Week 1 of the Golden Ticket Event starts NOW!    

To kick things off, we're doubling the amount of Star Atlas loot for week 1, featuring TWO Fimbul BYOS Tankships! Submit your golden tickets at the link below until 

How to submit your golden tickets:
 Head to https://hedgehog.markets/star-atlas
 Connect your wallet
 Click on "View Full Event Details" for Event 1
 Submit your golden tickets

Have questions? Use this: https://support.staratlas.com/sage-labs#golden-ticket
